title: Enhanced User Permissions with Time-Limited Access
excerpt: I think it’d be great if I could add someone to a board with a time limit. It would be useful if there was some more customization around adding people to boards, besides just being able to make them an owner or not. I’d…

posts.author: PaintedTree_cpdg (Cribby G)
posts.cookedHtml: I think it’d be great if I could add someone to a board with a time limit. It would be useful if there was some more customization around adding people to boards, besides just being able to make them an owner or not. I’d like to be able to edit how long they have access to this board.
